name: Dr. Ahsan Islam
bio: Expert in metabolic engineering and synthetic biology with extensive research experience at MIT, University of Toronto, and Imperial College London. Specializes in constraint-based metabolic modeling, genome-scale analysis, and microbial production of platform chemicals. Has 15+ years of research experience in chemical engineering and applied chemistry with focus on sustainable biomanufacturing.

name: Dr. Elena Martinez
bio: Expert in interpretable machine learning for genomics and systems biology. Previously at Stanford BioAI Center with 15+ years of experience in computational biology and AI research.

name: Dr. Sarah Chen
bio: Develops novel deep learning architectures for biological sequence analysis. Expert in transformers and attention mechanisms for genomics.

name: Dr. James Williams
bio: Leads metabolic network modeling and pathway optimization research. Background in synthetic biology and metabolic engineering.

name: Dr. Maria Rodriguez
bio: Working on multi-omics integration and single-cell analysis using advanced machine learning techniques.

name: Tamoghna Das
bio: Developing a digital twin of bioprocesses to optimize media and feeding strategies for industrial cell culture processes. Focus on high-throughput screening and multivariate data analysis to create predictive computational models that can revolutionize bioprocess design. Previously completed MSc in Biochemical Engineering at UCL and MSc in Data Science at University of East Anglia.
